{{Quote|I do not personally believe Risiev to be a traitor, but I do believe the Alliance must assume he is until we learn otherwise.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Vanden Willard/Legends|Vanden Willard]]|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Risiev Credal''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Jofoger]], Credal always felt a fascination for [[Realspace/Legends|space]] and ground battles. He became an expert tactician even before being recruited by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="AIR" />

Soon, he had a chance to show his skill in the defense of [[Sran Outpost]]. Because of his merits, he was promoted to officer, and became a respected tactician in the Alliance. However, he preferred to continue using the standard fleet trooper uniform.<ref name="AIR" />

He was then transferred to the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], where he would study tactics under expert [[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|Lieutenant Colonel]] [[Beryl Chiffonage]]. Chiffonage was known to teach him the [[Dsalisn Theories]] on low-atmosphere combat and the urban tactics used on [[Thyrsus/Legends|Thyrsus]].<ref name="AIR" />

[[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] also took an active intervention in Credal's training. Credal often unofficially discussed with Dodonna and [[Vanden Willard/Legends|Vanden Willard]] about the tactics used in Yavin; and during the pre-meeting sessions, Chiffonage and General [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] retold him tales of old, which he enjoyed.<ref name="AIR" />

In a more active role, he was sent on missions with high-ranking members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] such as Dodonna, Willard, [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]], [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]], [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], [[Pashna Starkiller]] and [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]]. He also helped to develop [[Attack Pattern Delta/Legends|Attack Pattern Delta]].<ref name="AIR" />

Trained and well-liked by the best, he seemed to have a stellar career in front of him. Only thirty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old, everybody thought he would become a Rebel leader.<ref name="AIR" />

One day, while he was supervising a patrol on [[Anoat system/Legends|Anoat system]], he jumped to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] without a warning, and effectively disappeared. His friends were reluctant to admit the possibility of him being a traitor, but they were forced to admit that he could be. Chiffonage wanted him to return so he could scold him, and then the two could be friends again.<ref name="AIR" />
